skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem:
The seven data values shown are: 2, 11, 5, 8, 7, 3, 9.

What is the median of the seven data values shown?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. Ordered from least to greatest, the data are 2, 3, 5, 7, 8, 9, 11. The middle (4th) value is 7.

Choice A is incorrect. This is the 3rd value when ordered, not the median.

Choice B is incorrect. This results from a calculation error.

Choice D is incorrect. This is the 5th value when ordered, not the median.
